sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17828" key="au)to/nekros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτό-νεκρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n17828.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">verily dead, a mere corpse,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
